summary: Comprehensive testing of CreatorFlow platform completed successfully. All major features tested including landing page, authentication flows, creator dashboard, brand dashboard, public store, and payment integration.

design_issues.issue: Chart width/height warnings in console - chart dimensions not properly calculated on initial load

passed_tests: Backend API health check (30/30 endpoints passing)
Landing page loads with all sections (hero, features, AI tools, pricing, testimonials, FAQ, calculator)
Auth flow - Creator login with demo@creator.com works correctly
Auth flow - Brand login with demo@brand.com works correctly
Creator Dashboard loads with stats, revenue chart, quick actions, activity feed
Public Store page loads for /store/sarahcreates with products and social links
Brand Dashboard loads with creator discovery and campaign management
Payment integration - Stripe checkout works for product purchases
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to auth page
Database seeding works correctly with demo data
AI tools backend endpoints return mocked data successfully
Campaign creation and deal management functionality works
Store preview and copy/share functionality works
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix chart rendering issue in Creator Dashboard - the Recharts component shows width/height warnings on initial load. This is likely due to container sizing not being properly calculated before chart renders.
